hooks.command: if ((Test-Path '.git') -and -not (Test-Path '.claude\settings.json')) { $base = "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\templates\project"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force '.claude' | Out-Null; Copy-Item "$base\.claude\settings.json" '.claude\settings.json' -Force; if (Test-Path "$base\.mcp.json") { Copy-Item "$base\.mcp.json" '.mcp.json' -Force }; Write-Output '{"systemMessage": "📋 הוגדר מה-template: settings.json + .mcp.json — פרויקט חדש זוהה"}' }

if (Test-Path 'package.json' -and -not (Test-Path 'node_modules')) { Write-Output '{"systemMessage": "⚠️ שים לב: קובץ package.json קיים אך תיקיית node_modules חסרה. מומלץ להריץ npm install"}' }; if (Test-Path '.env.example' -and -not (Test-Path '.env')) { Write-Output '{"systemMessage": "🔑 שים לב: קובץ .env חסר אך קיים .env.example. כדאי להעתיק וליצור קובץ הגדרות מקומי."}' }

if (Test-Path '.git') { $stat = git diff HEAD --stat 2>&1; if ($stat) { $lines = ($stat | Select-Object -First 12) -join '\n'; $out = @{systemMessage = ('📝 ' + $lines)} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Write-Output $out } }; exit 0
Write-Output '{"systemMessage": "Before compacting: note any open TODOs, architectural decisions, and lessons learned that should be saved to CLAUDE.md or rules/ before context is lost."}'

$json = [System.Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($json.tool_input.command -match 'rm -rf|reset --hard|drop table') { Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"BLOCKED: destructive command"}'; exit 1 }

$j = [System.Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -and (Test-Path $f -PathType Leaf)) { $d = Join-Path $PWD 'deletions'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $d | Out-Null; $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $n = [IO.Path]::GetFileName($f); Copy-Item $f (Join-Path $d "${ts}_$n") -Force }; exit 0

$j = [System.Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $j.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match '\brm\b|\bRemove-Item\b') { $parts = $cmd -split '\s+' | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^-' -and $_ -notin @('rm','Remove-Item','') }; foreach ($f in $parts) { if ($f -and (Test-Path $f -PathType Leaf)) { $d = Join-Path $PWD 'deletions'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $d | Out-Null; $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $n = [IO.Path]::GetFileName($f); Copy-Item $f (Join-Path $d "${ts}_$n") -Force } } }; exit 0

$j = [System.Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -notmatch '\.(ts|tsx)$' -or -not (Test-Path 'tsconfig.json')) { exit 0 }; $r = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $lines = ($r | Select-Object -First 5) -join ' | '; $out = @{systemMessage = ('⚠️ TypeScript: ' + $lines)} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Write-Output $out }; exit 0

$j = [System.Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -notmatch '\.(ts|tsx)$' -or -not (Test-Path 'tsconfig.json')) { exit 0 }; $r = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $lines = ($r | Select-Object -First 5) -join ' | '; $out = @{systemMessage = ('⚠️ TypeScript: ' + $lines)} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Write-Output $out }; exit 0
